narrative:
Twinsburg 3-B (precinct in Summit County) has 1,008 registered voters, with 57.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.2%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.1 percentage points.
